info.title: MailNowAPI
info.description: Self-hosted email service platform. Send transactional and marketing email, receive inbound mail, manage domains and webhooks, run sequences and broadcasts.

bearerAuth.description: API key in the form `es_xxxxxxxx`. Pass as `Authorization: Bearer es_xxx`.

post.description: Mint a new API key for the authenticated account. The full key is returned **only once** in the `key` field — store it before navigating away.

schema.description: Create an API key for the authenticated account. The full `key` field is returned only once on the response.

requestBody.description: Create an API key for the authenticated account. The full `key` field is returned only once on the response.

key.description: Full API key — shown only once on creation. Save it securely.

429.description: Rate limited — slow down and retry with exponential backoff.
Rate limited — slow down and retry with exponential backoff.

delete.description: Revokes the key immediately. Subsequent requests using it will return 401.

429.description: Rate limited — slow down and retry with exponential backoff.

post.description: Registers a domain and generates the SPF / DKIM / DMARC records you need to add. DNS verification is queued automatically (60s delay) and retries with backoff for up to 72h. Use `POST /v1/domains/:id/verify` to trigger immediately. **Multi-tenant platforms should prefer `POST /v1/companies/:id/domains`** so each customer's domain is scoped to their company.

schema.description: Register a sending domain. The response includes the SPF / DKIM / DMARC / MX records to add at your DNS host. Verification is queued automatically (60s delay) and retries with exponential backoff for up to 72 hours.

requestBody.description: Register a sending domain. The response includes the SPF / DKIM / DMARC / MX records to add at your DNS host. Verification is queued automatically (60s delay) and retries with exponential backoff for up to 72 hours.

429.description: Rate limited — slow down and retry with exponential backoff.

get.description: Lists domains owned by the authenticated account. Filter with `?unlinked=true` for domains not linked to any company, or `?company_id=...` to scope to one company.

429.description: Rate limited — slow down and retry with exponential backoff.

get.description: Returns the domain plus the current verification status of each DNS record.

429.description: Rate limited — slow down and retry with exponential backoff.

patch.description: Tune DMARC rua, return-path domain, per-domain send rate limit, BIMI logo URLs, MTA-STS mode, and TLS-RPT rua. Pass `null` for any field to unset it.

429.description: Rate limited — slow down and retry with exponential backoff.
Rate limited — slow down and retry with exponential backoff.

post.description: Triggers an immediate DNS verification pass on the domain (skipping the regular polling delay). Returns once the job is enqueued — poll `GET /v1/domains/:id` for the result.

429.description: Rate limited — slow down and retry with exponential backoff.

post.description: Queue a transactional email for delivery. Pass `scheduled_at` to send later. Set `idempotency_key` to make the call safely retryable.

from.description: Sender. Either `Name <email@example.com>` or a bare `email@example.com`. Must use a verified domain.

schema.description: Send a transactional email. Provide at least one of `html`, `text`, or `template_id`. Pass `scheduled_at` (ISO 8601) to delay the send. Set `idempotency_key` to make the call safely retryable.

requestBody.description: Send a transactional email. Provide at least one of `html`, `text`, or `template_id`. Pass `scheduled_at` (ISO 8601) to delay the send. Set `idempotency_key` to make the call safely retryable.

429.description: Rate limited — slow down and retry with exponential backoff.

get.description: Paginated list of emails sent from the authenticated account, newest first.

429.description: Rate limited — slow down and retry with exponential backoff.
Rate limited — slow down and retry with exponential backoff.

delete.description: Only emails that have not yet been sent (status `scheduled`) can be cancelled.

429.description: Rate limited — slow down and retry with exponential backoff.

post.summary: Send up to 100 emails in one call
post.description: Atomically queues up to 100 emails. Each item follows the same shape as `POST /v1/emails`. Per-email idempotency keys are honoured.

from.description: Sender. Either `Name <email@example.com>` or a bare `email@example.com`. Must use a verified domain.

items.description: Send a transactional email. Provide at least one of `html`, `text`, or `template_id`. Pass `scheduled_at` (ISO 8601) to delay the send. Set `idempotency_key` to make the call safely retryable.

429.description: Rate limited — slow down and retry with exponential backoff.

post.description: Subscribe to events. Each delivery is signed with HMAC SHA-256 over the raw body using the webhook's signing secret (returned **once** on creation). Failed deliveries retry with exponential backoff and land in the dead-letter queue after exhaustion.

schema.description: Subscribe to events. Each delivery is signed with HMAC-SHA256 over the raw body using the webhook's signing_secret (returned once on creation). Failed deliveries retry with exponential backoff and land in the dead-letter queue after exhaustion.

requestBody.description: Subscribe to events. Each delivery is signed with HMAC-SHA256 over the raw body using the webhook's signing_secret (returned once on creation). Failed deliveries retry with exponential backoff and land in the dead-letter queue after exhaustion.

429.description: Rate limited — slow down and retry with exponential backoff.
Rate limited — slow down and retry with exponential backoff.
Rate limited — slow down and retry with exponential backoff.

400.description: Bad request — validation failed or the request body is malformed.

429.description: Rate limited — slow down and retry with exponential backoff.
Rate limited — slow down and retry with exponential backoff.

get.description: Paginated list of attempted deliveries for a webhook. Filter by `status` to find failures.

429.description: Rate limited — slow down and retry with exponential backoff.

post.description: Re-enqueue a specific past delivery (success or failure) for redelivery.

429.description: Rate limited — slow down and retry with exponential backoff.

post.description: Re-enqueue dead-lettered (`exhausted`) or `failed` deliveries for this webhook. Defaults to up to 100 exhausted deliveries.

429.description: Rate limited — slow down and retry with exponential backoff.

get.description: Paginated list of all webhook deliveries that exhausted their retry budget across all webhooks on the account.

429.description: Rate limited — slow down and retry with exponential backoff.

requestBody.description: Create an audience to group contacts for broadcasts and sequences.

429.description: Rate limited — slow down and retry with exponential backoff.

post.summary: Upload a CSV and preview the import
post.description: Step 1 of CSV import. Send the raw CSV text in `csv`; the server returns headers, a suggested column→field mapping, a row preview, and an `import_id` to confirm next.

429.description: Rate limited — slow down and retry with exponential backoff.

post.summary: Confirm a CSV import mapping and start processing
post.description: Step 2 of CSV import. Confirm the column→field mapping returned by step 1; the import is queued and processed asynchronously. Poll `GET /:id/imports/:importId` for progress.

429.description: Rate limited — slow down and retry with exponential backoff.
Rate limited — slow down and retry with exponential backoff.

get.description: Streams the audience's contacts as a CSV file with `Content-Disposition: attachment`.

200.description: Successful response. Body is streamed in the format documented for this endpoint (e.g. `text/csv`, `application/octet-stream`).

429.description: Rate limited — slow down and retry with exponential backoff.

post.description: Schedule a one-to-many send to an audience. Optionally include an `ab_test` config to split-test subject + body across two variants. The response includes a deliverability lint score.

post.description: Gradually ramp send volume on a fresh domain over `total_days` (7–90, default 30). Optionally include external recipients (real Gmail / Yahoo / Outlook addresses) to broaden the reputation signal.

post.description: Create a sub-tenant company under the authenticated root account. Multi-tenant platforms create one company per customer. Company-scoped API keys cannot create new companies.

get.description: Lists companies the caller can see. User-level keys see all companies they own; company-scoped keys see only their own company.

post.summary: Create or link a domain to the company
post.description: Pass `{ domain_id }` to link an existing domain, or `{ name, mode? }` to create and link a new one in a single call. The response includes DNS records for the customer to configure.

429.description: Rate limited — slow down and retry with exponential backoff.

get.summary: List domains linked to the company

429.description: Rate limited — slow down and retry with exponential backoff.

delete.summary: Unlink a domain from the company
delete.description: Detaches the domain from the company without deleting it. The domain remains owned by the root account.

post.summary: Bulk-adopt master-account domains into a company
post.description: Migrates up to 100 stranded domains from the root account into this company in one call. Returns per-domain status so partial failures can be acted on.

429.description: Rate limited — slow down and retry with exponential backoff.

post.description: Creates a new account, adds it as a company member, optionally assigns a mailbox handle, and optionally mints a per-member API key — all in one call. The generated password and API key are returned **only once**.

schema.description: One-call provision of a customer member: creates the account, the company_member row, optionally a mailbox handle, and optionally an API key. Generated password and API key are returned only once.

requestBody.description: One-call provision of a customer member: creates the account, the company_member row, optionally a mailbox handle, and optionally an API key. Generated password and API key are returned only once.

post.description: Maps `local_part@domain` to a member account so that inbound mail to that address routes to the member.

post.description: Drop-in replacement for `POST https://api.resend.com/emails`. Accepts the Resend body shape and returns `{ id }`. Use this to migrate Resend clients without code changes — only the base URL.

429.description: Rate limited — slow down and retry with exponential backoff.

post.description: Drop-in replacement for `POST https://api.postmarkapp.com/email`. PascalCase keys (`From`, `To`, `Subject`, `HtmlBody`, ...) are translated server-side; the response matches Postmark's `{ To, SubmittedAt, MessageID, ErrorCode, Message }` envelope.

429.description: Rate limited — slow down and retry with exponential backoff.

post.description: Scans subject + body + sender for deliverability red flags (spam-trigger words, link-to-text ratio, missing alt text, link without unsubscribe, etc) without sending. Use this from a compose UI before showing a 'Send' button.

429.description: Rate limited — slow down and retry with exponential backoff.

tags.name: Emails
tags.description: Send transactional and one-off email; list, fetch, or cancel scheduled sends.

tags.name: Domains
tags.description: Verify and manage sending domains. Tunes DKIM, DMARC, return-path, BIMI, MTA-STS, and per-domain rate limits.

tags.name: Api Keys
tags.description: Mint, list, and revoke API keys for the authenticated account.

tags.name: Webhooks
tags.description: Subscribe to delivery, bounce, complaint, open, click, and inbound events. Includes delivery introspection and replay.

tags.name: Audiences
tags.description: Group contacts into audiences. CSV import / export, per-contact CRUD.

tags.name: Suppressions
tags.description: Account-wide suppression list — bounces, complaints, unsubscribes.

tags.name: Broadcasts
tags.description: One-to-many marketing sends to an audience, with scheduling and A/B testing.

tags.name: Templates
tags.description: Reusable email templates with variable substitution.

tags.name: Sequences
tags.description: Multi-step automated email sequences with branching logic.

tags.name: Warmup
tags.description: Gradually ramp send volume on a fresh domain.

tags.name: Companies
tags.description: Multi-tenant sub-accounts. Each company has its own domains, members, and API keys under a root account.

tags.name: Analytics
tags.description: Open / click / bounce / complaint stats for the account.

tags.name: Deliverability
tags.description: Per-domain deliverability summary and TLS-RPT reports.

tags.name: Events
tags.description: Stream email events (sent, delivered, bounced, opened, clicked, complained, unsubscribed).

tags.name: Inbox
tags.description: Read inbound email — folders, threads, messages, drafts.

tags.name: Drafts
tags.description: Compose and manage draft emails.

tags.name: Threads
tags.description: Conversation threads grouping inbound + outbound messages.

tags.name: Folders
tags.description: Organize inbound mail into folders.

tags.name: Signatures
tags.description: Reusable email signatures attached to outbound mail.

tags.name: Address Book
tags.description: Saved sender / recipient contacts (separate from audiences).

tags.name: Team
tags.description: Per-domain team members and their access scope.

tags.name: Mailboxes
tags.description: Account-level mailbox-handle administration.

tags.name: Sunset
tags.description: Deprecated endpoints with end-of-life metadata.

tags.name: Compat
tags.description: Drop-in compatibility shims for Resend and Postmark.

tags.name: Batch
tags.description: Send up to 100 emails in a single request.

tags.name: Privacy
tags.description: GDPR / CCPA data subject requests (export, delete).

tags.name: Webhook events
tags.description: Outbound events MailNowAPI POSTs to subscribed webhooks.
